upasargachandrika.example_text: 'antarvediSAKAyAH palASAnyasarvARi praSAtya mUlataH SAKAM parivAsyopavezaM karoti' (Apa॰SrO॰1.2.6.6)

'api vA kAmamA mArgAdA maDuna A prASAtikAd' (Apa॰SrO॰4.1.3.8) prASAtikaM koSIDAnyam yasmAtpraSAtanenodDriyate BakzyakARqezu mfgamAMsaparyantAnAM rasezu maDuparyantAnAm annezu ca prASAtikaparyantAnAM BakzaRe yATAkAmI eByo'vaSizweByaH parezAmaBakzaRameva (iti rudradattaH)
'Bagasya nayane krudDaH prahAreRa vyaSAtayat' (BA0 anu0 16018) vyaSAtayat apAtayat aBanak udaharat
